homeCare: Hydrate and rest in a dark, quiet room
Cold or warm compress based on comfort
Reduce screen brightness and take breaks
medicalInfo: Some people consider OTC pain relief for short-term discomfort (follow label guidance)
If headaches are frequent, consider tracking triggers and discussing with a clinician
redFlags: Headache with stiff neck and fever

homeCare: Rest and avoid heavy exertion if discomfort is new
If heartburn-like, avoid late meals and trigger foods
medicalInfo: Persistent or recurrent chest symptoms should be assessed clinically
redFlags: Chest pressure/tightness with shortness of breath
Pain radiating to jaw/arm, sweating, nausea
